name: C2xConvertTimeToMSSinceUTC
title: C2xConvertTimeToMSSinceUTC
syntax: int64 C2xConvertTimeToMSSinceUTC( int64 itsTimestamp, long refTime ); // form 1
int64 C2xConvertTimeToMSSinceUTC( long year, long month, long day, long hours, long minutes, long seconds, long milliseconds, long refTime ); // form 2
description: This function returns the elapsed milliseconds between a reference time and a time stamp.

As time stamp input either a Unix time stamp in milliseconds (form 1) or a UTC time given with year, month, hour and so on as separate parameters (form 2) can be given. Specific reference times can be set as additional parameter.
The result can be used for the time stamps defined in e.g. a CAM or a DENM.

parameters.name: itsTimestamp
parameters.description: Unix time stamp in milliseconds (time zone UTC)

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year of the UTC time stamp

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month of the UTC time stamp (1..12)

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: Day of the UTC time stamp (1..31)

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Hours of the UTC time stamp since midnight (0..23)

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: Minutes of the UTC time stamp after the hour (0..59)

parameters.name: seconds
parameters.description: Seconds of the UTC time stamp after the minute (0..59)

parameters.name: milliseconds
parameters.description: Milliseconds of the UTC time stamp after the second (1..999)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
